abstract: Jorge Aliss is the author of the popular SecureSocial Play plugin; he will describe what it does, why he made it and the types of authentication schemes it provides for Play Framework applications. No shop can introduce Scala into an existing Java code base without knowing why, where, how --- and how much. Mike Slinn of Micronautics Research Corporation and lead organizer of BASE will present a tutorial on the mechanics of Java / Scala interoperability. The
event_title: Effective Scala at Box in Los Altos
title: Effective Scala at Box in Los Altos
